name: Brown Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, baking soda, ground ginger, ground cinnamon, allspice, and salt.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the milk, honey, molasses, raisins, and orange marmalade.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
7. Let cool before serving.
SPECIAL NOTE: This is not a yeast bread and does not rise very high. The center of this may remain doughy but rest is good. You can also reduce to 1 1/2 cups flour, 3 tablespoons honey, 3 tablespoons molasses, 6 tablespoons raisins, 2 tablespoons marmalade, and 3/4 cup milk. Spices remain the same.
